title: Real-time alerts engine (kind: realtime)
summary: Streaming alert evaluation under 1s. Currently in design, prototype lives on a branch.

title: Cross-signal jump UI (/web/correlation/*)
summary: Native trace→logs→host metric navigation with workspace + time-range preserved.

title: Multi-tenant org isolation hardening
summary: Planner-level org-rewrite stays, plus storage-level prefix isolation.

title: Cardinality limit policies
summary: Per-stream limits on high-dim labels with cost reporting.

title: Official Helm chart
summary: Production Kubernetes story. Today only docker compose ships; Helm targets v1.0.

title: molesignal Cloud — invite beta
summary: Hosted multi-tenant. /cloud waitlist signups get the first invites.

title: Phase 4 design system
summary: OKLCH-calibrated indigo palette, 3-layer token system across the product UI.
